title: Senior Doctor - Aravind Eye Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Aravind Eye Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Aravind Eye Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aravind Eye Hospital:
Aravind Eye Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aravind Eye Hospital!
